method: manual verified retrieval via web search + web fetch (live XBRL JSON API endpoint not directly fetchable from this sandbox - see docs/02_retrieval_method_note.md)

sources.description: YETI Q4 & Full Year 2025 earnings press release (official investor relations page) - income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, GAAP-to-non-GAAP reconciliation for FY2025 (ended 2026-01-03) and FY2024 (ended 2024-12-28)
YETI FY2024 10-K filing index (SEC EDGAR) - confirms accession number, filing date, period of report, and links to the primary 10-K document
YETI 2018 Form 10-K (first annual report post-IPO) - five-year selected financial data table
